parsed_review.summary: CP00-370 is a descriptor-only billing-core pack (RP12.P02.M06.S15-RP12.P02.M07.S02, risk A, 10 units) and its claims are supported by static inspection. Pack identity, range, deliverable distribution {ui:1,implementation:2,failure_recovery:2,test:4,contract:1}, and micro-title distribution {Synthetic Fixture Set:8,Test And Golden Case Set:2} reconcile exactly across baseline, manifest, registry, contract (current_pack, p02_fixture_test_slice_descriptor, historical_pack_bindings tail), and closeout-pack-plan.json; handoff chains cleanly CP00-369->CP00-370->CP00-371 (next_subphase RP12.P02.M07.S03 == CP00-371 first unit). The pack-level production_ready claim is NOT overstated: manifest sets production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, implementation_layer=descriptor; the billing_core_p02_fixture_test_slice_descriptor_verified flag is descriptor-scoped only. No-write/no-real-data boundaries hold: service.js/registry.js are pure Object.freeze descriptor builders with no fs/network/exec/db calls (only *:false attestation flags), synthetic_only/no_real_data true, and the test+validator read only synthetic contract/plan JSON. Claude remains a read-only reviewer and is never promoted to final approver (claude_is_final_approval=false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false); review request is read-only with Read/Grep/Glob only. Hermes patterns are confined to deterministic descriptor evidence/receipt shapes (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false, hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product=false). CP178+ hardening is honored: invalid attempt-01 (socket API error, no structured output) was correctly rejected and preserved, auth preflight passed, prompt 2184B is under the 25600B limit, and no forbidden tools are present. Two P3 process observations are recorded (expected mid-sequence items, non-blocking): the post-review evidence artifacts and post-review gated validation commands are not yet present/independently verifiable in this read-only snapshot and must be satisfied by the deterministic control-plane steps before commit. No P0/P1/P2 issues; final enterprise-trust approval remains with the human, outside this receipt.

findings.title: Post-review evidence artifacts not yet present in reviewed snapshot
findings.details: manifest evidence_refs and required_pack_artifacts list docs/closeout-packs/cp00-370/claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json, but only manifest.json and command-evidence.json exist on disk. This is expected at status=implemented_pending_review with pack_level_claude_review.status=pending and valid_review_receipts=[]; this read-only review is the input that produces those artifacts (hardening sequence steps finding_adjudication and construction_inspection run after the Claude run). It is not an implementation defect, but the closeout gate must not finalize while they are absent.
findings.recommendation: Generate claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json from THIS accepted review and re-run npm run closeout-pack:validate before commit; ensure the closeout gate enforces presence of all five required_pack_artifacts.
findings.post_review_disposition: Expected pending-sequence item, not a defect. Resolve by completing the documented hardening sequence (normalize -> receipt_validate -> finding_adjudication -> construction_inspection -> final_closeout_validation) before commit.

findings.title: Post-review gated validation commands not independently verifiable by read-only reviewer
findings.details: command-evidence.json records pre-review implementation/plan/repo-wide validations as exit_code 0, which is corroborated by static inspection (registry binding, contract current_pack/descriptor/historical tail, plan units, and model.test.js/validate-rp12-billing-core-contract.mjs assertions are mutually consistent). However the post-review gated commands (closeout-pack:review:run/normalize/receipt:validate, closeout-pack-plan:generate, closeout-pack:validate, git diff --check --cached) are declared executed 'before commit' and cannot be confirmed by a read-only reviewer in this snapshot.
findings.recommendation: Confirm and capture the post-review gated command exit codes after this review is accepted and before commit; treat that evidence as required closeout input rather than assumed.
findings.post_review_disposition: Process dependency outside read-only scope. Verify in the deterministic control-plane receipt/validation step before commit; no code change required.
